name: CI/CD Pipeline Poisoning
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI) to inject malicious code into software builds and deployments
root_objective: Inject malicious code into production via compromised CI/CD pipeline

nodes.title: Poison CI/CD Pipeline for Malicious Deployment
nodes.description: Compromise the CI/CD pipeline to inject backdoors, steal secrets, or deploy malicious code to production environments

nodes.title: Compromise Source Code Repository
nodes.description: Gain write access to the source code repository to modify build or application code

nodes.title: Steal Developer PAT/SSH Key
nodes.description: Obtain a developer's personal access token or SSH key from leaked configs, compromised laptop, or phishing

nodes.title: Submit Malicious Pull Request
nodes.description: Submit a PR with subtle backdoor in a large changeset, relying on insufficient code review

nodes.title: Exploit CI/CD Configuration
nodes.description: Abuse the CI/CD pipeline configuration to execute malicious steps

nodes.title: Modify GitHub Actions Workflow
nodes.description: Alter .github/workflows YAML to add malicious steps that exfiltrate secrets or inject code during build

nodes.title: Exploit Jenkins Script Console
nodes.description: Access the Jenkins Groovy script console to execute arbitrary code on the build server

nodes.title: Compromise Build Dependencies
nodes.description: Inject malicious code via package dependencies pulled during build

nodes.title: Typosquatting Package Name
nodes.description: Publish a malicious package with a name similar to a popular dependency to catch typos

nodes.title: Compromise Shared GitHub Action
nodes.description: Take over a popular third-party GitHub Action to inject malicious code into all consuming workflows

nodes.title: Steal CI/CD Secrets
nodes.description: Extract secrets, tokens, and credentials stored in the CI/CD platform

nodes.title: Dump Environment Variables in Build
nodes.description: Add a step that prints or exfiltrates all environment variables including injected secrets

nodes.title: Access HashiCorp Vault via Build Role
nodes.description: Use the CI runner's Vault AppRole or JWT to authenticate and read production secrets
